name: Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: Friend, please call Senator Graham
body:
LindseyGraham.com

Please join us for this call with Senator Graham - you won't be
disappointed.

Do you have time to jump on a call with Senator Graham this
Wednesday, August 19th?

On this special supporter-only call, you'll be able to hear
directly from Senator Graham about the latest from the campaign
trail and the critical issues facing our nation.

This call is limited to Senator Graham's most loyal supporters,
so please visit this link now to find out how to participate.

Please join us for this call with Senator Graham.

Thanks,

Lindsey Graham 2016

Paid for by Lindsey
Graham 2016

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 14, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/issouebmNP

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Chris Christie
subject: No Way in Hill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
|

| |
---|---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43417142:18641873199:m:1:1516426255:D55F14005B0F2FC91535EA4859582914:r) |
| | | Dear Peter, Can you imagine what it would be like to wake up the morning after Election Day and realize that President Obama had just been elected to his third term? Well that's exactly what a President Hillary Clinton would mean for our country. A third Obama term? President Hillary Clinton? No way in Hill! Not if you and I have anything to do with it.
_**[Contribute $5 or more today and get your own limited edition "No Way in Hill" bumper sticker.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43417142:18641873199:m:1:1516426255:D55F14005B0F2FC91535EA4859582914:r)**_
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43417142:18641873199:m:1:1516426255:D55F14005B0F2FC91535EA4859582914:r) **[<<< Donate $5 Or More Here To Get Your No Way In Hill Bumper Sticker Today! >>> ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43417142:18641873199:m:1:1516426255:D55F14005B0F2FC91535EA4859582914:r)** The Democrats are treating this election like a coronation for Hillary Clinton. It's up to you and me to tell it like it is and say No Way in Hill.
Thank you,
Chris
_**[P.S. Contribute $20 or more today and my team will send you a 5 pack of limited edition "No Way in Hill" bumper stickers for you to share with your friends and family.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43417142:18641873199:m:1:1516426255:D55F14005B0F2FC91535EA4859582914:r)**_

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Happy Anniversary, Social Security! (Will you sign this?)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Today's a big day, Friend.

Social Security is turning 80, and while Pat Toomey is working to retire its many benefits, my team is celebrating.

We're celebrating because today marks 80 years of protecting the retirement security of millions of Americans. For eight decades, our country's seniors have had access to quality, affordable health care and today, 59 million people's lives are made easier by Social Security.

Our Commonwealth needs a leader who will lift people up and give them the ability to support themselves through retirement. Senator Pat Toomey is doing the exact opposite with his partisan attacks on Social Security.

**If you 're as proud as I am of what Social Security has done for Pennsylvanians -- and all Americans -- over the past 80 years, add your name to join the celebration:**

[**Sign your name today and show your support for 80 successful years of Social Security.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2892521621858287616/-8172043207631175680?ms=20150814.e)

Happy Anniversary, Social Security!

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2892521621858287616/-8099985613593247744?refcode=20150814e&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/2892521621858287616/-8244100801669103616).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Chris Roessner via Hillary for America
subject: Disgusting.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Why college affordability matters to me: | Friend --

I grew up in Canton, Ohio, dreaming about college. No one in our family had been to college before -- my mom told me if I worked hard, I could be the first. The day I got my acceptance letter from the University of Southern California was the happiest day of my life. Sitting at the kitchen table with my mom and stepdad, I couldn't understand why they looked so upset.

We flipped to the last page of the glossy welcome packet, the one with the tuition fees. My mom said, "We can't even afford your plane ticket to Los Angeles."

I was so angry. I'd held up my end of the bargain, so why couldn't I go to college? I spent three days being bitter, and then I did the only thing I could think of: I went to the army recruiter and signed up. Then 9/11 happened, and I was sent to Iraq. When I wasn't in active combat, I was filling out college applications in tents in the desert.

[**This week, Hillary introduced a $350 billion plan to make sure all kids can afford to go to college. This plan could help so many people like me -- will you take this quick quiz to learn how Hillary 's plan could help you and your family?**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjMyNjg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxMzQ0OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

After I got home, I worked my way through college and even graduate school. But my debt is overwhelming -- it's hard for me to help my family when so much of my income goes toward loan payments.

I've always been told that America is a place that allows us to achieve our dreams, and if you're willing to work hard, there's no limit to what you can do. Even after I risked my life for my country, paying for college still felt almost impossible. Something has to change to remove these financial barriers.

Last Thursday night during the Republican debate, not a single candidate mentioned college affordability or student debt. That's disgusting. This is one of the biggest issues facing Americans, and we need a plan to address it.

**Hillary 's plan addresses affordability and debt. Take a few minutes to see how her plan could help you and your family:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/collegequiz/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjMyNjg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxMzQ0OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I went from a 6-year-old kid with no shoes to being a first-generation college student, a veteran, and a Tillman Scholar. I hope you'll get involved in this campaign to make sure other kids from Canton -- and towns just like it -- have a shot at achieving their dreams, too.

Thanks,

Chris

---
******Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjMyNjg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxMzQ0OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjMyNjg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxMzQ0OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMyNjg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxMzQ0OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMyNjg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxMzQ0OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMyNjg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxMzQ0OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjMyNjg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxMzQ0OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjMyNjg4ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIxMzQ0OTU5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Ron Paul
subject: Don't listen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29749677:28526929958:m:1:879035888:1AFFAAC1275D0294F2D3706E86FF2294:r)

Dear Fellow Conservative:

If you want to know what I really think about my son, Rand, then don't listen to our national media.

Don't listen to the Big Government Washington insiders who'd love nothing more than another Bush/Clinton showdown in November of 2016.

Let me be clear...
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29749677:28526929958:m:1:879035888:1AFFAAC1275D0294F2D3706E86FF2294:r)
There is not one candidate who has run for president in my lifetime who can say they fully share my commitment to liberty, Austrian economics, small government, and following the Constitution, than my son, Rand Paul.

That's why I have wholeheartedly endorsed him.

**[And it's why I wanted to write to you today to personally urge you to sign your Pledge of Support for Rand](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29749677:28526929958:m:1:879035888:1AFFAAC1275D0294F2D3706E86FF2294:r)**.

_I know the media likes to play this little game where they pit us, or certain views, against each other_.

Don't fall for it. They're trying to manufacture storylines at liberty's expense. You've spent years seeing how the media treated me. They aren't my friends and they aren't yours.

So please don't waste your time or risk the massive gains you and I have made over the past eight years by suddenly believing Big Government apologists in our media are some sort of truth tellers.

Remember, truth is treason in the empire of lies. And nowhere is that more true than when it comes to Washington, D.C. and their media mouthpieces.

Even where Rand and I do have minor differences of opinion, I would take Rand's position over any of his opponents' in both parties every time.

_That's because he advocates diplomacy and negotiations, and opposes war_.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29749677:28526929958:m:1:879035888:1AFFAAC1275D0294F2D3706E86FF2294:r)
And Rand is the ONLY one in the race who is standing up for your Liberty, across the board.

You certainly saw a great example of that in the first debate. Chris Christie tried to trample all over your rights in a false attack.

Rand stopped him cold.

And it's nothing new for Rand. Whether it's filibustering to stop drones or the Patriot Act, or introducing the Fourth Amendment Protection Act, no one has fought harder for your rights than Rand.

And that's why, since the moment he announced his candidacy for President of the United States, our national media and the Big Government establishment has gone all-out to smear him or silence him.

They push other Big Government Republicans as "frontrunners" while ignoring polls showing Rand leading Hillary Clinton in key presidential Battleground States.

_They make sure he gets the least amount of time in a national debate (that sounds familiar)_.

They hype other candidates' easy access to Wall Street fat cats who leech off Big Government while ignoring the growing army of small donors Rand is building nationwide.

That's because they fear Rand more than any other candidate. They know he is our best hope to restore liberty, limited government and the Bill of Rights and finally end the big spending status quo in Washington, D.C.

Rand stood on the Senate floor for ten-and-a-half hours to force the Patriot Act to expire. Rand's stamina and determination called the nation's attention to President Obama's illegal and unconstitutional phone records collection. In the Senate, there is no greater champion of the Fourth Amendment and no one as fearless in staring down the establishment, Republican or Democrat.

It was his action, and his alone, that forced the NSA's bulk metadata collection programs to expire under Section 215 of the "PATRIOT Act." Not only that, but he continued to stand strongly against Washington, D.C.'s "Plan B" scheme, the misnamed "USA FREEDOM Act";

When President Obama was insisting on arming the Islamic rebels in Syria and bombing Assad, Rand stood firm and challenged the President. He even took to Fox News' TV airwaves in a live national address to counter President Obama's attempt to "gin up" war fever, infuriating Big Government Republicans like Karl Rove!

And don't forget Rand's first filibuster exposing the Obama administration's lawless use of drones, earning attacks from U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham and "wacko bird" name-calling from Senator John McCain. His historic 13-hour filibuster galvanized the American people unlike anything you and I have ever seen!
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29749677:28526929958:m:1:879035888:1AFFAAC1275D0294F2D3706E86FF2294:r)
He's also THE most stalwart opponent of the Federal Reserve in the Senate. He's fought against ObamaCare every step of the way. He's introduced budgets to slash spending and dig us out of our $18.3 TRILLION debt.

_He will keep our country out of senseless foreign wars that cost so many lives and bleed our treasury dry_. He's not afraid to lay the blame for making worse the chaos we see today with ISIS and Iraq squarely at the feet of the neocons.

And he's proven he's unafraid to stand up to anyone in Washington when the times call for it - even the leadership of his own party.

Rand stands ready to lead, and to win. He has my full support. I ask that he also have yours.

The truth is, Rand needs our grassroots army of liberty lovers more than ever.

The national media and the establishment of both parties would love nothing more than to drive a stake through the heart of our Liberty Movement and stop Rand at all costs.

They're going all-out to destroy him just like they tried to destroy me. And if they succeed, they'll go on to even more spending, spying, welfare and warfare in Washington, D.C.

I was able to weather the media's viciousness because I had patriots like you at my side. Because good folks like you stood with me, the Washington Machine failed. Our Liberty Movement continues to grow.

_Now, my son Rand needs us in his corner_. I'm answering the call. I'm proud to say I "Stand with Rand."

**[Can I count on you to join me? Will you please sign your Pledge of Support and chip in $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29749677:28526929958:m:1:879035888:1AFFAAC1275D0294F2D3706E86FF2294:r)**?

Please know every dollar is critical.

Unlike other candidates, Rand isn't depending on Wall Street fat-cats and banksters who want more special treatment, bailouts and stimulus packages to bankroll his candidacy.

He's depending on patriots like you who are willing to fight to take our country back.

Please join me in supporting him. **[Please sign your Pledge of Support and chip in $20.16 TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29749677:28526929958:m:1:879035888:1AFFAAC1275D0294F2D3706E86FF2294:r)**.

For Liberty,

Ron Paul

P.S. There is not one candidate who has run for president in my lifetime who can say they're more committed to liberty, Austrian economics, small government, the Constitution, and a rational foreign policy than my son, Rand Paul.

I'm proud to "Stand with Rand" despite media attacks trying to pit us against each other.

But Rand needs us now more than ever. **[So please sign your Pledge of Support and chip in $20.16 to his campaign](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29749677:28526929958:m:1:879035888:1AFFAAC1275D0294F2D3706E86FF2294:r)**. Whatever you can afford will help.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29749677:28526929958:m:1:879035888:1AFFAAC1275D0294F2D3706E86FF2294:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29749678:28526929958:m:1:879035888:1AFFAAC1275D0294F2D3706E86FF2294:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29749679:28526929958:m:1:879035888:1AFFAAC1275D0294F2D3706E86FF2294:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29749680:28526929958:m:1:879035888:1AFFAAC1275D0294F2D3706E86FF2294:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

They're going all-out to destroy him just like they tried to destroy me. And if they succeed, they'll go on to even more spending, spying, welfare and warfare in Washington, D.C. I was able to weather the media's viciousness because I had patriots like you at my side. Because good folks like you stood with me, the Washington Machine failed. Our Liberty Movement continues to grow. Now, my son Rand needs us in his corner. I'm answering the call. I'm proud to say I "Stand with Rand." ? Please know every dollar is critical. Unlike other candidates, Rand isn't depending on Wall Street fat-cats and banksters who want more special treatment, bailouts and stimulus packages to bankroll his candidacy. He's depending on patriots like you who are willing to fight to take our country back. Please join me in supporting him. . For Liberty, Ron Paul P.S. There is not one candidate who has run for president in my lifetime who can say they're more committed to liberty, Austrian economics, small government, the Constitution, and a rational foreign policy than my son, Rand Paul. I'm proud to "Stand with Rand" despite media attacks trying to pit us against each other. But Rand needs us now more than ever. . Whatever you can afford will help. Paid for by Rand Paul for President This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 16, 2015. For more information . | mailto:unsub-28526929958-echo3-2932A1DC0786808E930DDC9D53C2FAA5@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings **

name: MarcoRubio.com
subject: Weigh in: Trending Stories
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43426606:18651421763:m:1:1349778030:7BCBFA7C11B071C5C1CF45D09C23123C:r)
---
Peter, Re-opening the U.S. embassy in Cuba, bipartisan opposition to the President's Iran Deal, and more troubling findings about Hillary Clinton's private email server -- these were the stories driving the news this week. Marco shared his thoughts on all of these topics this week (read what he said below), but now it's your turn to weigh in and rank which story matters most to you. _**[Click here and make your selection.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43426607:18651421763:m:1:1349778030:7BCBFA7C11B071C5C1CF45D09C23123C:r)**_ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43426607:18651421763:m:1:1349778030:7BCBFA7C11B071C5C1CF45D09C23123C:r) **Marco 's Take** **** "From the very first day this came out, I said here's the biggest danger: If she received information that was classified and/or sensitive -- it doesn't have to be classified to be important. The Chinese, the Russians and others, they're not just looking for classified information." "They're looking for sensitive information -- things that give them insight into our thinking and into our strategy. There was no way you have all those emails going back and forth between her and her top deputies and it doesn't include sensitive information -- not to mention information that's been classified. So it's just really reckless and irresponsible." [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43426607:18651421763:m:1:1349778030:7BCBFA7C11B071C5C1CF45D09C23123C:r) **Marco 's Take** "President Obama has rewarded the Castro regime for its repressive tactics and persistent, patient opposition to American interests. He has unilaterally given up on a half-century worth of policy toward the Castro regime that was agreed upon by presidents of both parties." "The deal with Cuba threatens America's moral standing in our hemisphere and around the world, brings legitimacy to a state sponsor of terror, and further empowers an ally of China and Russia that sits just 90 miles from our shore." [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43426607:18651421763:m:1:1349778030:7BCBFA7C11B071C5C1CF45D09C23123C:r) **Marco 's Take** "Chuck Schumer obviously is a big deal, as a Democrat who's chosen to be a statesman, in this case, instead of a partisan. Will other Democrats join him? I hope so. Because as I've told my Democratic colleagues, 'you will live with your vote on this for the rest of your career and you will have to explain it for the rest of your lives.' **[_> >Click here and rank the trending news stories.<<_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43426607:18651421763:m:1:1349778030:7BCBFA7C11B071C5C1CF45D09C23123C:r)**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43426608:18651421763:m:1:1349778030:7BCBFA7C11B071C5C1CF45D09C23123C:r)
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
---|---|---

Unsubscribe](https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Thanks, FDR
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend, Eighty years ago today, President Franklin D. Roosevelt signed Social Security into law. For eighty years Social Security has kept the promise to help our seniors live their lives with dignity, and it has been a safety net for millions of Americans with disabilities and those who've lost loved ones.

But despite the millions of people it has helped over the years, Social Security is under constant threat from Republicans in Congress who want to cut benefits and let Wall Street CEOs gamble with seniors' economic security. We have to preserve and strengthen Social Security if we want to see it thrive for another 80 years.

All of us have friends and loved ones for whom Social Security has been a lifeline. So on this 80th anniversary of Social Security, I want to hear from you.**Share your story about what Social Security has meant to you or a loved one.**

[**Take a moment and click here to share what Social Security has meant to you.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f6d/70cdc2ba/479ac54a/3950525/3009543241/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/celebrate-80-years-of-social-security")

I have always fought to protect Social Security, and I always will.

Thanks for sharing your story,

Chris

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f6d/70cdc2ba/479ac54a/3950522/3009543241/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: George Pataki
subject: Leadership Matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc
body:
-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/98e6d660a3/ace65cf3c9/9d950451b6/sc=814eb
Friend,

Over the last six years our president has led by dividing Americans -
by class, by race, and by religion.

It's destructive and wrong - and everyone knows it.

We need a leader who can unite Americans and bring us together. I
will be that leader.

As governor, I cut taxes by more than the other 49 states combined,
and I did it in the deepest blue state in America.

If you agree we need a candidate with real experience, -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/98e6d660a3/ace65cf3c9/95b91b7901/sc=814eb please join us with a $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or even
$2,700 contribution today.

Americans want a leader who has been tested. We live in challenging
times, and there's no room for on-the-job training.

No presidential candidate has been tested like I have. Period.

I was at Ground Zero on September 11th. I felt the fire and stood in
the smolders. I vowed that day we would rebuild and recover, and
together we did.

You can tell a lot about a leader from how they handle a crisis.

When Hillary Clinton was tested in Benghazi, she failed - and
Americans died.

I know I can be the steadfast leader America deserves, but I need
your support to get there. -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/98e6d660a3/ace65cf3c9/31af8976d5/sc=814eb Please join our campaign with a $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500,
$1,000 or even $2,700 contribution today.

Thank you,

George Pataki

-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/98e6d660a3/ace65cf3c9/d9c09acba6/sc=814eb

Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc.

www.GeorgePataki.com -

name: Team Van Hollen
subject: Turning BLUE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend, Last week, the GOP presidential candidates debated, and we got a wake-up call to what a Republican president would do. They're promising increased attacks on women's health, plundering the middle class with trickle-down economics, and reversing every bit of progress we've made in the last seven years. We can't let that happen.

To stop them in their tracks we must take back control of the Senate, and we need you to help us _**[TURN THE SENATE BLUE](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f68/70cdc2ba/47995436/39504ac/2886246871/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/takebackseante?refcode=em081415_nd&amount=5.00")**_.

We need to start right now to take back the Senate and build a firewall against the GOP's backward policies. To do that, we have to make sure we have the budget to win, and this week, we're falling about $5,000 short.

Making up this gap will help us start next week off in a strong position to call voters, knock doors, and get our message out. **[Can you pitch in and help us get there?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f68/70cdc2ba/47995436/39504ac/2886246871/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/takebackseante?refcode=em081415_nd&amount=5.00")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Click to donate $3](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f68/70cdc2ba/47995436/39504ad/2886246871/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/takebackseante?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em081415_nd")** **[Click to donate $10](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f68/70cdc2ba/47995436/39504aa/2886246871/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/takebackseante?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em081415_nd")** **[Click to donate $15](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f68/70cdc2ba/47995436/39504ab/2886246871/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/takebackseante?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em081415_nd")** **[Or, donate another amount.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f68/70cdc2ba/47995436/39504ac/2886246871/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/takebackseante?refcode=em081415_nd&amount=5.00")** Thanks for your support,

Team Van Hollen

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
